name: schuly
description: Task runner for the Schuly Flutter app. Use `bun run <script>`.

scripts.install:dev: flutter build apk --flavor dev --release && flutter install --flavor dev
scripts.install:prod: flutter build apk --flavor prod --release && flutter install --flavor prod
scripts.apigen: bunx --bun @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://192.168.188.162:5033/swagger/v1/swagger.json -g dart-dio -o lib/api --additional-properties=pubName=schuly_api,pubLibrary=schuly_api && bun run apigen:patch && bun run apigen:build
scripts.apigen:local: bunx --bun @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -i http://localhost:5033/swagger/v1/swagger.json -g dart-dio -o lib/api --additional-properties=pubName=schuly_api,pubLibrary=schuly_api && bun run apigen:patch && bun run apigen:build
scripts.apigen:build: cd lib/api && dart pub get && dart run build_runner build
